name: PsExec Process Observed on a Compromised Host
notes: This rule triggers when a PsExec process has been detected on a compromised host.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created, (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set), (5001108) Success Audit: A network share object was accessed, (5002197) A service was installed in a system
when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: PsExec Process Observed, PsExec Process Masquerading
when any of Source IP are contained in any of Compromised Hosts - IP
TD_list: APPLY PsExec Process Observed on a Compromised Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created, (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set), (5001108) Success Audit: A network share object was accessed, (5002197) A service was installed in a system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: PsExec Process Observed, PsExec Process Masquerading
AND when any of Source IP are contained in any of Compromised Hosts - IP
RED_list: Event name: PsExec Has Been Launched From a Compromised Host
Event description: PsExec Has Been Launched From a Compromised Host
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
